case_title: MISSY KRISIK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KRISIK, MISSY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRISIK, MISSY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF KRISIK, MISSY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JAN-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MISSY KRISIK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY (CLAIM ADJUSTER). DEFENDANT CCSF INFORMS COURT THAT THEY ARE READY TO SETTLE OUTSIDE COURT. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES AS SETTLEMENT REACHED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
